sourceNote: Content constructed from publicly available summaries, not from the paywalled ISO standard. Users should verify against the purchased standard.

clauses.title: Context of the Organization
clauses.summary: Understanding the organization and its context, needs and expectations of interested parties, determining scope of AIMS, and establishing the AI management system.

clauses.title: Leadership
clauses.summary: Top management commitment, AI policy establishment, and assignment of organizational roles, responsibilities, and authorities.

clauses.title: Planning
clauses.summary: Actions to address risks and opportunities, AI objectives and planning to achieve them. Includes AI risk assessment specific to AI system impacts.

clauses.title: Support
clauses.summary: Resources, competence, awareness, communication, and documented information management for the AIMS.

clauses.title: Operation
clauses.summary: Operational planning and control, AI risk assessment execution, and AI risk treatment implementation.

clauses.title: Performance Evaluation
clauses.summary: Monitoring, measurement, analysis, and evaluation. Internal audit and management review of the AIMS.

clauses.title: Improvement
clauses.summary: Nonconformity and corrective action, and continual improvement of the AIMS.
